title: [FIRRTL] Remove BlackBoxResourceAnno Usages
body:
`BlackBoxResourceAnno` had been deprecated since FIRRTL 1.5.0 and Chisel APIs that used to use this were changed to eagerly read the Java resource pointed at by the API and generate a `BlackBoxInlineAnno`.  It is safe, in CIRCT, to fully remove support for any `BlackBoxResourceAnno`-related logic that we have in the FIRRTL Dialect.

It is reasonable to also add a warning/error that this annotation is not supported and users should upgrade their Chisel/FIRRTL versions.
